series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of documents from the pre-hiring screening process related to individuals hired and individuals not hired by the agency, including: polygraph examinations, BCII/FBI criminal-record checks, and results of physical examinations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: one year or during probationary period, whichever is longer, individuals who are hired one year individuals not hired ; Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format one year or during probationary period, whichever is longer, individuals who are hired Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format one year individuals not hired Once converted into verified machine-readable format, if at all, shred paper copies
